element_introduction_order.mastery_context: limits special attack usage and effectiveness; strategic resource management
character-specific super moves requiring rage gauge management
used strategically to affect opponent behavior and build meter
returning boss from first game, encountered before final boss
secret boss encounter if specific conditions met; escaped in first game, now final confrontation
each character has adapted initiation move for their super special attack
single punch required to increase rage gauge
defeat multiple punks under time limit to increase maximum health

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: tournament progression with escalating difficulty; boss encounters interrupt sequence; bonus stages provide relief and resource building opportunities between fights

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Geese Howard accessible as secret boss under specific performance requirements during single-player tournament

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduces all 12 playable characters with varying skill levels; players learn rage gauge mechanics through early tournament matches
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Mr. Big encountered again; opponent AI becomes more sophisticated; rage gauge management becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Geese Howard final boss; high enemy AI noted in critical reception; requires mastery of character-specific desperation moves and tactical meter management
notable_spikes: Secret Geese Howard boss (if conditions met)

notable_level_patterns.description: Single-player campaign follows martial arts tournament structure with all 12 characters competing; player selects character and progresses through matched opponents with escalating difficulty
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Tournament bracket progression culminating in Geese Howard

notable_level_patterns.description: Between-fight relief stages offering three distinct challenges: tree chopping (rage gauge increase), punk defeat under time limit (health increase), and character-specific Super Death Blow initiation training
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Tree chopping, punk defeat, super move stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Mr. Big serves as mid-tournament boss returning from first game; Geese Howard appears as final boss or secret encounter based on player performance criteria
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mr. Big midpoint, Geese Howard finale
